name: JOHNSON BABY OIL 1*50ML
description: Clinically proven mild and irritation-free oil designed for babies' delicate skin, enriched with Vitamin E for gentle nourishment during massage and daily care.

name: KETOMAC SHAMPOO
description: An anti-dandruff shampoo used for treatment and prevention of dandruff, controlling flaking, scaling and itching.
uses: Relief from itching associated with dandruff
dosage: Wet hair and scalp, apply shampoo, massage, keep for 5-10 minutes before rinsing.

name: KETOROL-DT 1*15TAB
description: Pain-relieving medicine used for the short-term management of severe or intense pain, such as post-operative pain, toothache, joint pain, and muscle aches.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; dissolve tablet in water. Should not be taken for more than 5 days.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, heat and moisture.
